div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 182px; height: 225px; padding-top: 10px; margin-left: 10px;

div.div:
Answer

- content : string
- postedBy : User
- comments : Comment {list}
- flagCount : int

- downvotes : int
